This is reviewed blocker evidence only, not release acceptance. It records that the source files and compose overlay are present, but the Docker-capable host cannot pull node:22-alpine or nginx:1.27-alpine and no target frontend image is cached.
The evidence intentionally redacts the registry proxy endpoint, raw daemon failure text, host paths, env-file values, credentials, and secret-like runtime material.

Source revision and OCI revision labels point to 18454a9, but inherited runtime-subject/runtime-rollout/source_revision alias labels and the external env-file compose label remain open source-authority follow-ups.
